This appears in the current liabilities section and is the best available current borrowing line; lease rows are excluded.

variables.notes: R:nc. Chose a label outside the shortlist. The first occurrence of 'Liabilities to Credit Institutions' is positioned in the current liabilities section and appears to represent short-term borrowings/current bank debt. Manual review is recommended because the same row label also appears elsewhere for non-current debt, creating location-based ambiguity.
No clear taxes payable/current tax liabilities line is identifiable on the provided balance sheet.
